name: Barbarian
description: A fierce warrior of primitive background who can enter a battle rage.
skill_choices_options: Animal Handling, Athletics, Intimidation, Nature, Perception, Survival

name: Bard
description: An inspiring magician whose power echoes the music of creation.
weapon_profs: Simple weapons, Hand crossbows, Longswords, Rapiers, Shortswords
tool_profs: Three Musical Instruments of your choice
starting_equip_a: Leather Armor, 2 Daggers, Musical Instrument, Entertainer's Pack

name: Cleric
description: A priestly champion who wields divine magic in service of a higher power.
starting_equip_a: Chain Shirt, Shield, Holy Symbol, Priest's Pack

name: Druid
description: A priest of the Old Faith, wielding the powers of nature and adopting animal forms.
weapon_profs: Clubs, Daggers, Javelins, Maces, Quarterstaffs, Scimitars, Sickles, Slings, Spears
skill_choices_options: Arcana, Animal Handling, Insight, Medicine, Nature, Perception, Religion, Survival
starting_equip_a: Leather Armor, Shield, Druidic Focus, Explorer's Pack, Scimitar

name: Fighter
description: A master of martial combat, skilled with a variety of weapons and armor.
skill_choices_options: Acrobatics, Animal Handling, Athletics, History, Insight, Intimidation, Perception, Survival
starting_equip_a: Chain Mail, 1 Martial Melee Weapon, Handaxe (x2), Dungeoneer's Pack

name: Monk
description: A master of martial arts, harnessing the power of the body in pursuit of physical and spiritual perfection.
tool_profs: One Artisan's Tool or Musical Instrument of your choice
skill_choices_options: Acrobatics, Athletics, History, Insight, Religion, Stealth
starting_equip_a: Spear, 5 Daggers, Artisan's Tools or Musical Instrument, Explorer's Pack

name: Paladin
description: A holy warrior bound to a sacred oath.
skill_choices_options: Athletics, Insight, Intimidation, Medicine, Persuasion, Religion
starting_equip_a: Chain Mail, Shield, Longsword, 6 Javelins, Holy Symbol, Priest's Pack

name: Ranger
description: A warrior who uses martial prowess and nature magic to combat threats on the edges of civilization.
skill_choices_options: Animal Handling, Athletics, Insight, Investigation, Nature, Perception, Stealth, Survival
starting_equip_a: Studded Leather Armor, Shortsword (x2), Longbow, Quiver of 20 Arrows, Dungeoneer's Pack

name: Rogue
description: A scoundrel who uses stealth and trickery to overcome obstacles and enemies.
weapon_profs: Simple weapons, Hand crossbows, Longswords, Rapiers, Shortswords
skill_choices_options: Acrobatics, Athletics, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Investigation, Perception, Persuasion, Sleight of Hand, Stealth
starting_equip_a: Leather Armor, 2 Daggers, Thieves' Tools, Burglar's Pack

name: Sorcerer
description: A spellcaster who draws on inherent magic from a gift or bloodline.
skill_choices_options: Arcana, Deception, Insight, Intimidation, Persuasion, Religion

name: Warlock
description: A wielder of magic derived from a bargain with an extraplanar entity.
skill_choices_options: Arcana, Deception, History, Intimidation, Investigation, Nature, Religion
starting_equip_a: Leather Armor, Arcane Focus (Orb), Dagger (x2), Scholar's Pack

name: Wizard
description: A scholarly magic-user capable of manipulating the structures of reality.
skill_choices_options: Arcana, History, Insight, Investigation, Medicine, Religion
starting_equip_a: Spellbook, Spellcasting Focus (Arcane), 2 Daggers, Scholar's Pack
